sourceBlueprintBlock: blueprint/phase-9-the-assurance-ledger.md#9I. Full-program exercises, BAU transfer, and formal exit gate
temporaryFallback: Repository-native Phase9ExitGateService evaluates current proof-family rows, emits a WORM/audit settlement, and blocks release-to-BAU unless every mandatory row is exact.
riskIfUnresolved: BAU signoff could be inferred from checklist status or dashboard calmness instead of current graph, tuple, settlement, and scorecard proof.
followUpAction: Task 472 must consume this decision as final Phase 9 proof when reconciling the programme conformance scorecard.
whyFallbackPreservesAlgorithm: The fallback is fail-closed, hash-bound, idempotent, and uses the same source refs and evidence files required by section 9I.
